mapper.select: select flow_id, order_id, flow_status, action_type, operator_id, operator_name, action_time, reject_reason, shipping_photos, remark from oms_order_flow where order_id = #{orderId} order by action_time asc
mapper.insert: insert into oms_order_flow(order_id, flow_status, action_type, operator_id, operator_name, action_time, reject_reason, shipping_photos, remark) values(#{orderId}, #{flowStatus}, #{actionType}, #{operatorId}, #{operatorName}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, #{rejectReason}, #{shippingPhotos}, #{remark})
